name: Moussaka
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Lean ground beef or lamb
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a large skillet. Saute onion until soft.
2. Add beef (1/2 pound at a time) and cook in batches until browned.
3. Cook with tomatoes, parsley, and tomato paste for 10 to 15 minutes.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Set aside.
5. Heat oil in a large frying pan. Flour eggplants lightly.
6. Saute eggplants on both sides in hot oil until golden.
7. Fry potatoes in the same skillet using additional oil if necessary. Set aside.
8. Melt 1 cup butter in a medium saucepan. Gradually add flour, stirring to form a smooth paste.
9. Gradually add hot milk, stirring over low heat until thick and smooth.
10. Mix in eggs, cheese, nutmeg, salt, and pepper to taste.
11. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
12. In a 2-quart baking dish, arrange alternating layers of potatoes, meat sauce, eggplant, meat sauce, and remaining eggplant.
13. Pour the cheese sauce over the top.
14. Bake until golden, about 50 to 60 minutes.
